seoTitle: Aberfoyle Park vs Adelaide — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Aberfoyle Park and Adelaide. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Aberfoyle Park vs Adelaide: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Aberfoyle Park and Adelaide.
heading: Aberfoyle Park vs Adelaide — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Aberfoyle Park, South Australia and Adelaide, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Aberfoyle Park has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Adelaide (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Aberfoyle Park or Adelaide safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Aberfoyle Park has a flood risk score of 43/100, while Adelaide scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Aberfoyle Park scores 32/100 for bushfire risk. Adelaide scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Aberfoyle Park or Adelaide?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Aberfoyle Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.22% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
